title: 3 set of HengKe Jar Gripper, 9 Pieces Multi-Purpose Reusable Rubber Gripper Jar Opener Gripper Rubber Jar,Gripper Pads Round Kitchen Coasters Multi-Purpose Bottle Lid Openers Fit for Most Bottles
description:
About this item
❤Non-slip material: jar gripper pads made of premium rubber material, non-slip anti-scald and high resistance There are many fine lines on the surface of the anti-skid jar opener gripper, which is effective anti-skid and not easy to release. that can help you open jar or bottle easily
❤Multi-Purpose rubber jar gripper: Three shapes to accommodate different jar. Red cone shaped ribbed grip for smaller bottles and jars and teal square and green round flat grip for large jars.
❤Easy to use: Put the rubber gripper jar opener on the top of the bottle and twist it in the direction indicated, so that the lid can be opened easily. The jar grips provide superior grip when opening stubborn jars and containers of all sizes
❤Home must-have toolsl:Very practical kitchen gadgets make your cooking more convenient.Make it easier for you to prepare a sumptuous holiday dinner for your family.
❤100% satisfaction guarantee: we are full of confidence in our products, so we provide you with satisfactory after-sales service, if you have any dissatisfaction with the products, you can contact us at any time, we also provide a 30-day return and replacement service
reviews_5s:
We love these little “tools” for opening stubborn lids. They work fantastically.These are great! Helps opening jars so easily! Different sizes and shapes for all jars.Great assortment of shapes and sizes. Work well.Burned up one of my old slip pads when it stuck to the bottom of a pot that I then placed on the cooktop without realizing it. These pads were impossible to find in stores, so I had to order similar ones on Amazon. Cups are perfect for opening new bottle tops like juice jars which are small and hard to grip. Pads we use to keep hot soup bowls from sliding around on a dinner plate used to transport bowl to, and serve on, the dinner table.Simple and cheap, these just do what they should - help you open just about any bottle or jar. And they last forever (or at least 5 years so far....)They have a good rubbery sticky surface that grips well. For sure helps get lids off.
Only time will tell how long they last before oxidation and loss of grip.I love the red cones, they seem to open everything so easily. My arthritis keeps me from opening a lot of lids and other misc. things around the house. I don't need 3, so I give the others away. Not a lot of use for the others, but I keep one of those handy too.Love to open bottlesGreat for people with arthritis in their hands to open jars, etc. I have a set for myself and bought them as a gift for my sister who was thrilledCan't live without these! I ALWAYS keep one set in the kitchen, another in my utility room, one is the master bath, and one set in the garage. Great for opening difficult jars and bottle lids--or other things that need some force and a good grip to open. Perfect for the elderly whose fingerprints are smooth and leave them unable to "get a grip" on typical things around the house or yard.
reviews_1s: Sorry I bought these, they have such an incredible overwhelming stench that I had to remove them from the kitchen and exile them to the garage in a plastic bag. Washing them and heating them did not remove the bad smell, will probably end up throwing them away after I get something similar from a local store.Due to cancer treatments my fingers and hands have difficulty opening bottles, medications, etc. I was looking for a small gripper, especially to open water bottles. The red cone-shaped ones looked like they’d work. Nope. It wouldn’t grip the cap and eventually the water ended up all over me. The small, round, flat grippers are low quality and useless. The product wasn’t expensive but it was still a total waste of money.These are too smooth to grip. I got some that were textured.They are way smaller than I expected
